executive_summary.current_state: Mature full-stack application with complex features but needs redesign for clean, minimalistic white-sheet theme targeting youth self-discovery
executive_summary.target_audience: Young people (16-25) navigating career uncertainties and personal growth
executive_summary.primary_objective: Transform existing platform into emotionally resonant, minimalistic interface that invites exploration rather than overwhelming users
executive_summary.key_philosophy: Listen, learn, and show doors that open/close - avoid telling youth what to become

frontend.styling: Tailwind CSS 3.3.0 with custom premium theme system
frontend.ui_library: Custom components with Framer Motion animations

backend.ai_services: Multiple LLM services for career recommendations

core_features.user_authentication: Complete with OAuth and role-based access
core_features.personality_assessments: HEXACO and Holland Code tests implemented
core_features.skill_tracking: Interactive skill trees with progress visualization
core_features.note_taking: Personal space for reflections and saved items

visual_design.typography: Clean, readable fonts with generous spacing
visual_design.layout: Plenty of white space, card-based components

youth_specific_requirements.engagement: Interactive but not gamified to the point of distraction

key_components_to_redesign.landing_page: Transform from current complex design to clean, inviting interface
key_components_to_redesign.dashboard: Simplify homepage to focus on next steps
key_components_to_redesign.assessment_ui: Make tests feel conversational, not clinical
key_components_to_redesign.career_exploration: Present options as doors to explore

technical_constraints.compatibility: Must work with existing backend APIs
technical_constraints.performance: Maintain fast load times and smooth interactions
technical_constraints.data_integration: Preserve existing user data and preferences

primary_user.characteristics: Uncertain about future, seeks guidance without pressure
primary_user.needs: Safe space to explore, non-judgmental feedback, gradual discovery
primary_user.pain_points: Overwhelmed by choices, fear of making wrong decisions
primary_user.goals: Understand themselves better, discover potential paths

secondary_users.educators: Want to guide students without overwhelming them

implementation_priorities.phase_1: Landing page redesign with clean aesthetic

design_principles: White space is your friend - use it generously
Respect for user's pace and choices
immediate_actions: Audit current UI for overwhelming elements
Simplify color palette to whites/grays/soft blues
Add moments of reflection throughout flows
long_term_vision: Platform that feels like a trusted friend
Interface that adapts to user's emotional state
AI that suggests rather than pushes
Growth tracking that celebrates small wins

next_steps: Create mood boards for white-sheet aesthetic
Conduct user testing with target demographic
